author: Gosuke Miyashita
message:
Merge pull request #765 from ryot4/suppress-ohai-error

host_inventory/ohai: Suppress error messages to avoid parse error

author: ryot4
message:
host_inventory/ohai: Suppress error messages to avoid parse error

ohai prints errors to stderr, but when request_pty is true, they are
merged into stdout and causes parse error.

author: Arnaud Rebillout

Add support for Kali Linux

author: Gosuke Miyashita
message:
Merge pull request #763 from terceiro/suse-hijacks-debian

Specinfra::Helper::DetectOs::Suse: avoid misdetection when zypper is installed

author: Antonio Terceiro
message:
Specinfra::Helper::DetectOs::Suse: avoid misdetection when zypper is installed

I happened to have zypper installed on a Debian host (it's packaged in
Debian), and this causes the SuSE detection to detect the system as
being SuSE even though it's not.

author: Ryan Davis
message:
Skip all tests that are leaky and causing test order dependency errors

mostly running this sequence of commands:

```
$ rspec ./spec/backend/{ssh,lxd,dockercli} ./spec/backend/exec/build_command_spec.rb --order random
$ rspec ./spec/backend/{ssh,lxd,dockercli} ./spec/backend/exec/build_command_spec.rb --order random --seed 49775
$ rspec ./spec/backend/{ssh,lxd,dockercli} ./spec/backend/exec/build_command_spec.rb --order random --seed 49775 --bisect
$ rspec ./spec/backend/exec/build_command_spec.rb[1:1:1:1,1:1:2:1,1:1:2:2,1:1:3:1,1:1:4:1,1:1:5:1,1:1:6:1,1:1:7:1] ./spec/backend/lxd/build_command_spec.rb[1:1:10:1] --order random --seed 49775
```

author: Ryan Davis
message:
Get CI minimally working again

* Add 3.3 and 3.4.
* Drop rubies < 2.3.
* Bump all older versions to be latest X.Y.
* Nuke old ruby 2.2 test task.

author: Ryan Davis
message:
CI seems not to be running for the last year despite recent commits

Local runs are broken out of the box.

CI is also very very out of date. 3.2 is the latest but next to EOL.

Please enable issues. This is hostile to contributions.


author: Gosuke Miyashita
message:
Merge pull request #760 from fuminori-ido/feature_fix_subclasses

fix 'stack level too deep' caused by local re-definition of Class#subclasses

author: ido
message:
fix 'stack level too deep' caused by local re-definition of Class#subclasses

Class#subclasses is added officially since ruby 3.1 so that the local
definition is no longer necessary.

author: Gosuke Miyashita
message: Bump version

author: Gosuke Miyashita
message:
Merge pull request #759 from takumin/feat-platform-codename-host-inventory

feat: Add `platform_codename` host inventory

author: Takumi Takahashi
message:
feat: Add `platform_codename` host inventory

In Debian and Ubuntu, codenames are used in various places, such as
APT repository settings.

If the codenames can be obtained from the host inventory, users will
no longer need to check the /etc/os-release file individually.

author: Gosuke Miyashita
message: Bump version

author: Gosuke Miyashita
message:
Merge pull request #758 from chuhn/debian_testing_again

Detect Debian Testing and assign a impossibly high version number

author: Christopher Huhn
message: Straighten out the logic and assign a conveniently high version number on detection of Debian Testing
